generated_oml:
instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Input current sensor on the MABI MAX 100 robot arm"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorPayload
]

instance OutputAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Output angle sensor on the MABI MAX 100 robot arm"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RobotSensorPayload
]

instance RobotSensorPayload : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "MQTT payload representing time-series input current and output angle from MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor, OutputAngleSensor
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of input current collected from InputCurrentSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorPayload
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance AngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of output angle collected from OutputAngleSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RobotSensorPayload
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker that ingests sensor data from the robot and streams it to the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables TunedControlService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulink environment for simulation of robot control logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables TunedControlService
]

instance RedisStoreEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "In-memory Redis data store aggregating state for real-time visualization and prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables TunedControlService
]

instance SysMLv17ArchitectureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 tool for system architecture modeling"
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton tool for component-connector and state-machine behavior modeling"
]

instance AADLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL tool for architecture description and analysis"
]

instance DSRMClassDiagramEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "UML class diagram tool for capturing Digital Shadow Reference Model schema and abstraction layers"
]

instance TunedControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that aggregates sensor data, computes friction characteristics, and adjusts controller parameters for the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionAnalysisInsight, ControlParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance FrictionAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computed friction characteristics derived from aggregated sensor traces"
]

instance ControlParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically adjusts control parameters such as PID gains to improve robot precision"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RobotArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 model representing the system architecture of the MABI MAX 100 robot, including IBDs and component interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLv17ArchitectureEnabler
]

instance RobotBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc automaton model describing state-machine behavior of the robot joints and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MontiArcAutomatonEnabler
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model used for real-time simulation of robot control logic and motion"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DSRMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "UML class diagram capturing the Digital Shadow Reference Model, defining shadow data schema and abstraction layers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DSRMClassDiagramEnabler
]

instance AADLArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AADL model depicting the system architecture for analysis purposes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AADLEnabler
]

instance AggregatedStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated robot state data stored in Redis for real-time visualization and prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RedisStoreEnabler
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Modeling in a digital twin follows MBSE practices that separate the system description into several abstraction layers: requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, and product/technical layer. These layers represent successive stages in the twin’s lifecycle, with higher‑level models informing the development of more concrete ones. Transition between stages relies on maintaining traceability across the different abstraction layers. The article does not specify explicit governance artifacts for life‑cycle management."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The MQTT broker operates over TCP/IP on the standard port 1883 (or 8883 for TLS), with QoS level 0 or 1. The network topology follows a publish/subscribe architecture: each sensor acts as a publisher, and the ingestion layer subscribes to relevant topics. No additional transport protocols or encryption layers are specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The text references the use of standardized architecture description languages: SysML (including IBDs), ACME, AADL, and MontiArc. These are recognized modeling standards for system specification. No other industry‑specific or certification standards are mentioned in the provided document."
]
